name: oslab-secure
description: Secure OS Lab Reference Platform on Cloudflare Workers

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html style.css favicon.svg dist/ || true && cp -rf css2 dist/css2 || true && cp app.js compiler.js data.js docs_content.js marked.min.js dist/ || true
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.test: node -c app.js && node -c compiler.js && echo '✅ All JS files valid'

author: Anonymous
